headerDisplay: Control DIHOOL IPS-S2 scissor lifts via the eWeLink LAN protocol. Enter your eWeLink credentials for automatic device discovery, or configure devices manually with their Device ID and LAN Key.

username.title: eWeLink Email or Phone
username.description: Your eWeLink account email or phone number. Required for automatic device discovery.

countryCode.title: Country Code
countryCode.description: Your country calling code (e.g. +1 for US, +44 for UK).

mode.title: Connection Mode
mode.description: In 'auto' mode, the plugin logs into eWeLink to discover devices, then controls them over LAN. In 'lan' mode, no cloud connection is made.

devices.title: Lift Devices
devices.description: Per-device configuration. If using cloud discovery, devices are found automatically -- use this section only for overrides. For LAN-only mode, you must provide Device ID and LAN Key.

deviceId.title: Device ID
deviceId.description: The eWeLink device ID (e.g. 100293a98d). Found in eWeLink app under device settings.

label.title: Display Name
label.description: Custom name for this lift in HomeKit.

lanKey.title: LAN Key
lanKey.description: Device encryption key. Required for LAN-only mode. Use the get-lankey script to obtain this.

ipAddress.title: IP Address Override
ipAddress.description: Manual IP address. Skips mDNS discovery for this device.

operationTimeUp.title: Up Travel Time (seconds)
operationTimeUp.description: Time in seconds for the lift to travel from fully down to fully up.

operationTimeDown.title: Down Travel Time (seconds)
operationTimeDown.description: Time in seconds for the lift to travel from fully up to fully down.

upChannel.title: Up Channel
upChannel.description: eWeLink outlet index for the UP motor control. Default: 0.

downChannel.title: Down Channel
downChannel.description: eWeLink outlet index for the DOWN motor control. Default: 1.

showDebugSwitches.title: Show Debug Switches
showDebugSwitches.description: Expose raw channel switches as separate HomeKit accessories for debugging.

layout.title: eWeLink Account
layout.description: Enter your eWeLink credentials for automatic device discovery.
